default_policy: Existing non-Kenney visible assets are replacement candidates by default. Kenney assets may remain only after keep-review validation.

mappings.replacement_reason: Kenney bear remains acceptable only after strict keep-review; Meshy plush landmark is staged to improve playroom arena identity.
mappings.validation_result: Headless Godot import created valid GLB import metadata; generator now instantiates the Meshy plush landmark in home_yard_v3. Route clearance, screenshot review, and production acceptance remain pending.

blocked_items: Fill in final Meshy task ids after paid generation approval and completion.
Replace planned paths with accepted asset paths after import and validation.
